languages.original_text: "Do not grieve for what has been lost, brethren: those who have fallen in the battle for righteousness will be warmed in the God-Emperor's sight after death!"

languages.text: "Не печальтесь о потерях, братья: те, кто пал в битве за праведность, будут согреты взором Бога-Императора босле смерти!"
"Do not grieve for what has been lost, brethren: those who have fallen in the battle for righteousness will be warmed in the God-Emperor's sight after death!"
languages.original_text: "Не печальтесь о потерях, братья: те, кто пал в битве за праведность, будут согреты взором Бога-Императора босле смерти!"

traits.locale_text: "Do not grieve for what has been lost, brethren: those who have fallen in the battle for righteousness will be warmed in the God-Emperor's sight after death!"
"Do not grieve for what has been lost, brethren: those who have fallen in the battle for righteousness will be warmed in the God-Emperor's sight after death!"
"Do not grieve for what has been lost, brethren: those who have fallen in the battle for righteousness will be warmed in the God-Emperor's sight after death!"

languages.text: 「失われたものを悲しむな、兄弟たち。正義のために戦場で倒れた者たちは、死後、神皇帝の目に映って暖かくなるだろう！」
languages.original_text: "Do not grieve for what has been lost, brethren: those who have fallen in the battle for righteousness will be warmed in the God-Emperor's sight after death!"

traits.locale_text: 「失われたものを悲しむな、兄弟たち。正義のために戦場で倒れた者たちは、死後、神皇帝の目に映って暖かくなるだろう！」

languages.text: « Ne pleurez pas ce qui est perdu, mon frère : ceux qui périssent au champ d'honneur rejoindront l'Empereur-Dieu après la mort et baigneront dans la chaleur de son regard ! »
languages.original_text: "Do not grieve for what has been lost, brethren: those who have fallen in the battle for righteousness will be warmed in the God-Emperor's sight after death!"

traits.locale_text: « Ne pleurez pas ce qui est perdu, mon frère : ceux qui périssent au champ d'honneur rejoindront l'Empereur-Dieu après la mort et baigneront dans la chaleur de son regard ! »

languages.text: "Trauert nicht um das Verlorene, Brüder: Jene, die in der Schlacht um Gerechtigkeit fielen, werden nach ihrem Tod im Licht des Gottimperators gewärmt."
languages.original_text: "Do not grieve for what has been lost, brethren: those who have fallen in the battle for righteousness will be warmed in the God-Emperor's sight after death!"

traits.locale_text: "Trauert nicht um das Verlorene, Brüder: Jene, die in der Schlacht um Gerechtigkeit fielen, werden nach ihrem Tod im Licht des Gottimperators gewärmt."

languages.text: "Kaybedilenler için yas tutmayın kardeşlerim: Doğruluk savaşında düşenler, ölümden sonra Tanrı İmparator'un nazarında ısınacaktır!"
languages.original_text: "Do not grieve for what has been lost, brethren: those who have fallen in the battle for righteousness will be warmed in the God-Emperor's sight after death!"

traits.locale_text: "Kaybedilenler için yas tutmayın kardeşlerim: Doğruluk savaşında düşenler, ölümden sonra Tanrı İmparator'un nazarında ısınacaktır!"

languages.text: «No os lamentéis por lo que se ha perdido, hermanos: ¡quienes mueren en combate por una causa justa hallarán solaz al contemplar el semblante del Dios Emperador en la otra vida!».
languages.original_text: "Do not grieve for what has been lost, brethren: those who have fallen in the battle for righteousness will be warmed in the God-Emperor's sight after death!"

traits.locale_text: «No os lamentéis por lo que se ha perdido, hermanos: ¡quienes mueren en combate por una causa justa hallarán solaz al contemplar el semblante del Dios Emperador en la otra vida!».

languages.text: “兄弟们，别为逝者哀恸：凡为正义捐躯者，死后灵魂必将在神皇的注视下得到温暖！”
languages.original_text: "Do not grieve for what has been lost, brethren: those who have fallen in the battle for righteousness will be warmed in the God-Emperor's sight after death!"
